"The road doesn't care where you've been. It only knows where you're going."

THE CONDUCTOR

Born from the dust and fire of the Australian bush, The Mark David Express rolls through town with raw, unfiltered sound that hits like a freight train at midnight.

Part outlaw, part poet, all rock'n'roll. This train doesn't stop for anyone.
